svg.title: Adaptation rates of training systems
svg.desc: Conceptual adaptation curves for neural, cardiovascular, muscle, tendon, and bone systems over 52 weeks.
svg.text: Adaptation Rates: Why Mechanical Load Needs Pace Control
Conceptual synthesis across training literature; curves show relative timing, not diagnostic thresholds.
Heart and breathing can feel ready
before tendons and bone have adapted.
Pace gives an external target for
Evidence anchors: MacInnis & Gibala 2017; Hawley et al. 2018; Kubo et al. 2010; Bohm et al. 2019; Warden et al. 2021.
